targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, sum AS "TRIMP" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, sum AS "Krafttraining" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp_krafttraining' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, sum AS "Gehen" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp_gehen' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, sum AS "Radfahren" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp_radfahren' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, avg AS "HRV (ms)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'heart_rate_variability' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, vmin AS "Ruhepuls (bpm)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'resting_heart_rate' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, avg AS "HF-Erholung" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'cardio_recovery' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day

SELECT DATE(start_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Vienna') AS "Datum", name AS "Sportart", ROUND((duration_s/60)::numeric,0) AS "Dauer (min)", ROUND(active_energy_kcal::numeric,0) AS "Energie (kcal)", ROUND(avg_hr::numeric,0) AS "Ø HR (bpm)", ROUND(distance_km::numeric,2) AS "Distanz (km)" FROM workouts WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT ref_date AS "Datum", kind AS "Art", note AS "Hinweis", ROUND(severity::numeric,2) AS "Schweregrad" FROM findings WHERE kind IN ('training_load','recovery_alert') AND ref_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY ref_date DESC
